text: In the past month, have you been bothered by feeling nervous, anxious, or on edge?
In the past month, have you been bothered by not being able to stop or control worrying?
In the past month, have you been bothered by worrying too much about different things?
In the past month, have you had trouble relaxing?
In the past month, have you been so restless that it's hard to sit still?
Over the past two weeks, have you been bothered by little interest or pleasure in doing things?
Over the past two weeks, have you been bothered by feeling down, depressed, or hopeless?
Over the past two weeks, have you had trouble falling or staying asleep, or sleeping too much?
Over the past two weeks, have you been bothered by feeling tired or having little energy?
Over the past two weeks, have you been bothered by poor appetite or overeating?
Over the past two weeks, have you been bothered by feeling bad about yourself or that you are a failure?
Over the past two weeks, have you had trouble concentrating on things?
Have you been moving or speaking so slowly that other people could have noticed?
Have you been feeling so fidgety or restless that you have been moving around a lot more than usual?
Over the past month, have these feelings significantly interfered with your daily activities?
Do you currently feel that you have adequate support from family or friends?
In the past month, how often have you felt overwhelmed by stress?
Over the past month, have you experienced significant changes in your sleep patterns?
